cases.name: unknown op
cases.reason: op name is not in the v1 vocabulary

cases.name: bad font
cases.reason: font_family must be in the backend text-element registry

cases.name: missing required field
cases.reason: edit_text requires both bar_index and text

cases.name: out of bounds text index
cases.reason: bar_index must point into the snapshot text bars

cases.name: duration beats rejected
cases.reason: set_clip_duration accepts duration_s seconds only, not beats

cases.name: split outside slot window
cases.reason: split_clip.at_s is assembled-output time inside the slot output window
